title: Justicia prachuapensis
taxonomy: Justicia prachuapensis is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the genus Justicia. The species is native to Thailand and is part of the larger family of Acanthaceae, which includes over 2,000 species of flowering plants. The family Acanthaceae is a part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms, or flowering plants. The classification of Justicia prachuapensis reflects its evolutionary history and relationships to other plant species within the Acanthaceae family.

intro: Justicia prachuapensis, also known as Thai borage, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The health benefits of Justicia prachuapensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as diabetes and hypertension, due to its antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Thai medicine, Justicia prachuapensis is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antidiabetic effects.
